objects.name: vg_customer_customer_first_dates
objects.view_definition:
SELECT cfd.CID AS RealCID
     , cfd.GCID
     , dc.RegisteredReal AS RegistrationDate
     , dc.FirstDepositDate
     , dc.FirstDepositAmount
     , df.ID AS FTDPlatformID
     , CASE WHEN df.Name = 'Trading' THEN 'TradingPlatform'
            WHEN df.Name = 'IBAN' THEN 'eMoney'
            ELSE df.Name
       END AS FTDPlatformName
     , cfd.FirstPosOpenDate
     , cfd.LastDepositDate
     , cfd.LastDepositAmount
     , cfd.VerificationLevel1Date
     , cfd.VerificationLevel2Date
     , cfd.VerificationLevel3Date
     , cfd.FirstNewFundedDate AS FirstFundedDate
     , cfd.LastNewFundedDate
     , cfd.LastCashoutDate
     , ffa.FirstAction
     , ffa.FirstActionDate
     , ffa.FirstInstrument
     , ffa.FirstCross
     , ffa.FirstCrossDate
     , fc.CurrentClub AS FirstClub
     , fc.Date AS FirstClubDate
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_cidfirstdates_masked cfd
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked dc
  ON cfd.CID = dc.RealCID
LEFT JOIN main.bi_db.bronze_moneybusdb_dictionary_accounttypes df
  ON dc.FTDPlatformID = df.ID
LEFT JOIN main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_first5actions ffa
  ON cfd.CID = ffa.CID
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT ccl.CID,
         ccl.Date,
         ccl.CurrentClub
  FROM main.general.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_clubchangelogproduct ccl
  WHERE ccl.IsFTC = 1
) fc
  ON fc.CID = cfd.CID

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: GCID
columns.comment: Global Customer ID - globally unique customer identifier across all eToro entities. From Dim_Customer.GCID. Used for cross-system joins (e.g., ComplianceStateDB uses GCID). (Tier 2 - SP code, Dim_Customer)

columns.name: RegistrationDate
columns.comment: Date when the customer first registered a Real account.

columns.name: FirstDepositDate
columns.comment: First successful deposit date. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositDate via Fact_BillingDeposit. 1900-01-01 = no deposit (sentinel). Filter with YEAR(FirstDepositDate) != 1900. (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

columns.name: FirstDepositAmount
columns.comment: Amount of the first successful deposit in USD. Default 0. From Dim_Customer.FirstDepositAmount. (Tier 2 - SP code, Dim_Customer)

columns.name: FTDPlatformID
columns.comment: Platform/account type of the first deposit (AccountTypeId from source). Added 2025-09-12. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: FTDPlatformName
columns.comment: Platform name on which the first deposit was made (e.g., TradingPlatform, eMoney).

columns.name: FirstPosOpenDate
columns.comment: First position open date (manual or copy-trade). From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID IN (1,2). Uses MIN logic. (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: LastDepositDate
columns.comment: Most recent deposit date. From Fact_BillingDeposit via #fundingLast (ModificationDate). Updated daily for new deposits. (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

columns.name: LastDepositAmount
columns.comment: Amount of the most recent deposit in USD. From Fact_BillingDeposit (Amount * ExchangeRate). (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_BillingDeposit)

columns.name: VerificationLevel1Date
columns.comment: Date customer first reached Verification Level 1. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=1). May be backfilled from higher levels. (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: VerificationLevel2Date
columns.comment: Date customer first reached Verification Level 2. From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=2). Backfilled from Level 3 if NULL. (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: VerificationLevel3Date
columns.comment: Date customer first reached Verification Level 3 (fully verified). From Fact_SnapshotCustomer (MIN date where VerificationLevelID=3). (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_SnapshotCustomer)

columns.name: FirstFundedDate
columns.comment: Date when the customer first became funded (Equity > 0).

columns.name: LastNewFundedDate
columns.comment: Most recent date the customer was in funded status. From DDR daily status and Function_Population_Funded. Updated daily. (Tier 2 - SP code)

columns.name: LastCashoutDate
columns.comment: Most recent withdrawal/cashout date. From Fact_CustomerAction where ActionTypeID=8 (MAX). (Tier 2 - SP code, Fact_CustomerAction)

columns.name: FirstAction
columns.comment: Asset class of the customer's 1st open position. CASE on InstrumentTypeID+MirrorID: 'Crypto' (typeID=10), 'FX/Commodities/Indices' (1/2/4), 'Stocks/ETFs' (5/6), 'Copy Fund' (CopyFund manager), 'Copy'. NULL if no position opened (~88.3%). Distribution: Crypto 5.3%, Stocks/ETFs 3.6%, Copy 1.4%, FX/Commodities/Indices 1.3%, Copy Fund 0.1%.

columns.name: FirstActionDate
columns.comment: Datetime of 1st open position. From BI_DB_CustomerCross PIVOT (rn=1, MAX(Occurred)).

columns.name: FirstInstrument
columns.comment: Display name of the first traded instrument. ISNULL(ParentUserName, InstrumentName): for Copy positions, shows the copied trader's username; for direct trades, shows Dim_Instrument.Name.

columns.name: FirstCross
columns.comment: Detailed asset class of 1st position (legacy). From BI_DB_CustomerCross PIVOT (ActionType_Detailed, rn=1). Same values as FirstAction_Detailed. ~6.5% non-NULL.

columns.name: FirstCrossDate
columns.comment: Datetime of 1st cross event (from BI_DB_CustomerCross.Occurred, rn=1).

columns.name: FirstClub
columns.comment: The customer’s current club name, which is resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name at ETL time, with possible values of Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, or P.

columns.name: FirstClubDate
columns.comment: Date of first eToro Club tier assignment.

objects.name: vg_customer_daily_snapshot
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
    dd.DateKey AS DateID,
    dd.FullDate AS Date,
    dd.MonthNumberOfYear,
    dd.ISOYearAndWeekNumber,
    dd.DayNumberOfWeek_Sun_Start,
    dd.MonthName,
    dd.MonthNameAbbreviation,
    dd.DayName,
    dd.DayNameAbbreviation,
    dd.CalendarYear,
    dd.CalendarYearMonth,
    dd.CalendarYearQtr,
    dd.IsLastDayOfMonth,
    dd.IsWeekday,
    dd.IsWeekend,
    dps.RealCID,
    dps.IsFunded,
    dps.ActiveTraded,
    dps.Portfolio_Only,
    dps.BalanceOnlyAccount,
    dps.GlobalDeposited,
    dps.GlobalRedeposited,
    dps.GlobalCashedOut,
    dps.Redeemed,
    fsc.RegulationID,
    fsc.PlayerLevelID,
    fsc.CountryID,
    fsc.MifidCategorizationID,
    fsc.IsValidCustomer,
    fsc.IsCreditReportValidCB,
    dc.MarketingRegionManualName AS Region,
    dr1.Name AS Regulation,
    dc.Name AS Country,
    dpl.Name AS ClubTier,
    dmc.Name AS MifidCategory,
    CASE 
        WHEN dmc.MifidCategorizationID IN (2,3) THEN 'Professional' 
        ELSE 'Retail' 
    END AS MifidType,
    dc2.Name AS CitizenshipCountry,
    fsc.GuruStatusID,
    dgs.GuruStatusName,
    CASE
        WHEN fsc.GuruStatusID > 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS IsPI,
    fsc.AccountStatusID,
    ast.AccountStatusName,
    fsc.PlayerStatusID,
    pst.Name AS PlayerStatusName,
    pst.CanOpenPosition,
    pst.CanClosePosition,
    pst.CanEditPosition,
    pst.CanBeCopied,
    pst.CanDeposit,
    pst.CanRequestWithdraw,
    fsc.PlayerStatusReasonID,
    psr.Name AS PlayerStatusReasonName,
    fsc.PlayerStatusSubReasonID,
    pssr.PlayerStatusSubReasonName,
    fsc.AccountManagerID,
    concat(dm.FirstName, ' ', dm.LastName) AS AccountManager,
    fsc.LanguageID,
    dl.Name AS Language,
    fsc.CommunicationLanguageID,
    dcl.Name AS CommunicationLanguage,
    fsc.AccountTypeID,
    act.Name AS AccountType
FROM main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_date dd
JOIN main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_customer_daily_status dps
    ON dd.DateKey = dps.DateID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked fsc
    ON dps.RealCID = fsc.RealCID 
    AND dd.DateKey BETWEEN fsc.FromDateID AND fsc.ToDateID  -- OPTIMIZED: Using fact table directly instead of dim_range join
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dc
    ON fsc.CountryID = dc.CountryID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel dpl
    ON fsc.PlayerLevelID = dpl.PlayerLevelID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_mifidcategorization dmc
    ON fsc.MifidCategorizationID = dmc.MifidCategorizationID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_regulation dr1
    ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked dc1
    ON fsc.RealCID = dc1.RealCID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dc2
    ON dc1.CitizenshipCountryID = dc2.CountryID
LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_gurustatus dgs
    ON fsc.GuruStatusID = dgs.GuruStatusID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_accountstatus ast
    ON fsc.AccountStatusID = ast.AccountStatusID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_accounttype act
    ON fsc.AccountTypeID = act.AccountTypeID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerstatus pst
    ON fsc.PlayerStatusID = pst.PlayerStatusID
LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerstatusreasons psr
    ON fsc.PlayerStatusReasonID = psr.PlayerStatusReasonID
LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerstatussubreasons pssr
    ON fsc.PlayerStatusSubReasonID = pssr.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_language dl
    ON fsc.LanguageID = dl.LanguageID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_language dcl
    ON fsc.CommunicationLanguageID = dcl.LanguageID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_manager dm
    ON fsc.AccountManagerID = dm.ManagerID
WHERE fsc.IsValidCustomer = 1

columns.name: DateID

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Calendar date - equals parameter `@date`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: MonthNumberOfYear
columns.comment: Month number within the year (1-12).

columns.name: ISOYearAndWeekNumber
columns.comment: ISO year and week number (e.g., 2026W15).

columns.name: DayNumberOfWeek_Sun_Start
columns.comment: Day number of the week (Sunday=1).

columns.name: MonthName
columns.comment: Full month name (e.g., January).

columns.name: MonthNameAbbreviation
columns.comment: Abbreviated month name (e.g., Jan).

columns.name: DayName
columns.comment: Full day name (e.g., Monday).

columns.name: DayNameAbbreviation
columns.comment: Abbreviated day name (e.g., Mon).

columns.name: CalendarYear
columns.comment: Calendar year (e.g., 2026).

columns.name: CalendarYearMonth
columns.comment: Year-month key (e.g., 202604).

columns.name: CalendarYearQtr
columns.comment: Year-quarter key (e.g., 2026Q2).

columns.name: IsLastDayOfMonth
columns.comment: `'Y'` if FullDate is the last day of its calendar month, else `'N'`. (Tier 2 - live sample)

columns.name: IsWeekday
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if this date is a weekday (Mon-Fri).

columns.name: IsWeekend
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if this date is a weekend (Sat-Sun).

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Real customer ID. Population from 5-layer waterfall (TP -> IBAN -> Options -> OptionsMIMO -> MoneyFarm). HASH distribution key. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: IsFunded
columns.comment: 1 if customer meets ALL four funded criteria: (1) real deposit IsDepositor=1 excl. bad-FTD cohort (13K users $1 FTDs Aug 18-20 2025 with no subsequent real deposit); (2) KYC level 3 verified; (3) at least one non-airdrop activity (TP trade, IOB credit ActionTypeID=36/CompReasonID=57, or Options trade); AND (4) positive equity today across TP/eMoney/Options. All four must hold simultaneously. Source: Function_Population_Funded. (Tier 1)

columns.name: ActiveTraded
columns.comment: DDR top engagement tier. 1 if the customer explicitly opened a new position (ActionTypeID 1 or 39), opened/added capital to a copy mirror (ActionTypeID 15=OpenMirror, 17=AddMirror), or placed an Options trade on this date. Auto-created copy positions do NOT qualify. Includes Options trading via Function_Revenue_OptionsPlatform. Source: Function_Population_Active_Traders. (Tier 1)

columns.name: Portfolio_Only
columns.comment: **`Function_Population_Portfolio_Only`** output persisted as DECIMAL per DDL - analytics treat nonzero as **portfolio/HODL** segment participation for `@date`. `AccountActive` tests `ISNULL(Portfolio_Only,0)` in SP logic. (Tier 2 - Function_Population_Portfolio_Only)

columns.name: BalanceOnlyAccount
columns.comment: DDR lowest engagement tier (numeric equity not 0/1). Positive equity on any platform (TP NWA+Liability, eMoney ClosingBalanceBO x FXRate, Options TotalEquity) but no open positions and no qualifying trading actions in the period. Returns max combined equity across platforms. Excludes Active Traders and Portfolio Only. Source: Function_Population_Balance_Only_Accounts. (Tier 1)

columns.name: GlobalDeposited
columns.comment: Deposited today on any platform (excluding internal transfers). ISNULL(0). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: GlobalRedeposited
columns.comment: Redeposited today (not FTD, not internal). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: GlobalCashedOut
columns.comment: Withdrew today on any platform (excluding internal transfers). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: Redeemed
columns.comment: Billing redeem withdrawal today. From MIMO IsRedeem flag. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: RegulationID
columns.comment: Regulation ID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer for the date range. FK -> DWH_dbo.Dim_Regulation. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: PlayerLevelID
columns.comment: Player level ID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country ID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. FK -> DWH_dbo.Dim_Country. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: MifidCategorizationID
columns.comment: MiFID categorization ID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: IsValidCustomer
columns.comment: Valid customer flag from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: IsCreditReportValidCB
columns.comment: Credit report valid flag from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation.

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English.

columns.name: ClubTier
columns.comment: Tier display name (e.g. Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A).

columns.name: MifidCategory
columns.comment: MiFID II client categorization (e.g., Retail, Professional). Resolved from Dim_MifidCategorization.

columns.name: MifidType
columns.comment: Classification as ’Professional’ if MifidCategorizationID is 2 or 3, otherwise ’Retail’.

columns.name: CitizenshipCountry
columns.comment: Country of citizenship. Resolved from Dim_Country via CitizenshipCountryID.

columns.name: GuruStatusID
columns.comment: eToro Popular Investor/Guru program status - whether the customer is an active copy trading strategy provider. FK to Dictionary.GuruStatus. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: GuruStatusName
columns.comment: Human-readable PI tier name. Values: No, Certified, Cadet, Rising Star, Champion, Elite, Elite Pro, Removed, Rejected. Used in BackOffice customer views, Trade procedures, and SalesForce integration. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.GuruStatus)

columns.name: IsPI
columns.comment: Popular Investor flag. `CASE WHEN GuruStatusID >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`. Source: Fact_SnapshotCustomer.GuruStatusID. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: AccountStatusName
columns.comment: Human-readable label for the account state: 'Open', 'Closed', or 'N/A'. Used in reporting to display account state. Sourced directly from Dictionary.AccountStatus.AccountStatusName. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.AccountStatus)

columns.name: PlayerStatusID
columns.comment: Player status ID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: PlayerStatusName
columns.comment: Current player status name (e.g., Active, Blocked). Resolved from Dim_PlayerStatus.

columns.name: PlayerStatusReasonID
columns.comment: Reason code for current PlayerStatusID. Provides the why behind a non-Active status. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatusReasonName
columns.comment: Reason for current player status. Resolved from Dim_PlayerStatusReasons.

columns.name: PlayerStatusSubReasonID
columns.comment: Sub-reason code for PlayerStatus (hierarchical). FK to Dictionary.PlayerStatusSubReasons. Added 2022 (COINF-1989). (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatusSubReasonName
columns.comment: Human-readable sub-reason label (renamed from production `Name`). Nullable. Key abbreviations: CHBK=Chargeback, POI=Proof of Identity, POA=Proof of Address, FTD=First Time Deposit, MOP=Method of Payment, PWMB=eToro Money, SAR=Suspicious Activity Report, WCH=World Check. Key values: Fraud (1), Fake docs (2), ACH CHBK (35), Credit Card CHBK (36), PayPal CHBK (37), SAR filed (73), FATCA (66), W-8BEN (76), Vulnerable Client (75). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.PlayerStatusSubReasons)

columns.name: AccountManagerID
columns.comment: Currently assigned BackOffice sales/service agent (renamed from ManagerID). FK to BackOffice.Manager. NULL = unassigned. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: AccountManager
columns.comment: Concatenated staff member’s first and last name.

columns.name: LanguageID
columns.comment: Customer preferred platform language. FK to Dictionary.Language. Controls UI language. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Language
columns.comment: Language display name.

columns.name: CommunicationLanguageID
columns.comment: Language for customer communications (emails, notifications). May differ from LanguageID if customer has different communication preferences. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: CommunicationLanguage
columns.comment: Customer's preferred communication language (emails, notifications). Resolved from Dim_Language.Name via CommunicationLanguageID. May differ from platform Language. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Language)

columns.name: AccountTypeID
columns.comment: Account type ID from Fact_SnapshotCustomer. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Daily_Status)

columns.name: AccountType
columns.comment: Human-readable account type label.

objects.name: vg_customer_monthly_snapshot
objects.view_definition:
SELECT
    dd.DateKey AS DateID,
    trunc(dd.FullDate, 'MM') AS MonthStartDate,
    dd.FullDate AS MonthEndDate,
    dd.MonthNumberOfYear,
    dd.ISOYearAndWeekNumber,
    dd.DayNumberOfWeek_Sun_Start,
    dd.MonthName,
    dd.MonthNameAbbreviation,
    dd.DayName,
    dd.DayNameAbbreviation,
    dd.CalendarYear,
    dd.CalendarYearMonth,
    dd.CalendarYearQtr,
    dd.IsLastDayOfMonth,
    dd.IsWeekday,
    dd.IsWeekend,
    dps.RealCID,
    dps.IsFunded_ThisMonth,
    dps.ActiveTraded_ThisMonth,
    dps.Portfolio_Only_ThisMonth,
    dps.BalanceOnlyAccount_ThisMonth,
    dps.GlobalDeposited_ThisMonth,
    dps.GlobalRedeposited_ThisMonth,
    dps.GlobalCashedOut_ThisMonth,
    dps.Redeemed_ThisMonth,
    fsc.RegulationID,
    fsc.PlayerLevelID,
    fsc.CountryID,
    fsc.MifidCategorizationID,
    fsc.IsValidCustomer,
    fsc.IsCreditReportValidCB,
    dc.MarketingRegionManualName AS Region,
    dr1.Name AS Regulation,
    dc.Name AS Country,
    dpl.Name AS ClubTier,
    dmc.Name AS MifidCategory,
    CASE 
        WHEN dmc.MifidCategorizationID IN (2,3) THEN 'Professional' 
        ELSE 'Retail' 
    END AS MifidType,
    /*
    cdl.ClusterDetail,
    cdl.ClusterSF,
    cdl.IsLastCluster,
    cdl.IsFirstCluster,
    cdl.IsSFCluster,
    cdl.UpdateDateIDSF,
    cdl.ClusterDynamic,
    */
    dc2.Name AS CitizenshipCountry,
    fsc.GuruStatusID,
    dgs.GuruStatusName,
    CASE
        WHEN fsc.GuruStatusID > 1 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS IsPI,
    fsc.AccountStatusID,
    ast.AccountStatusName,
    fsc.PlayerStatusID,
    pst.Name AS PlayerStatusName,
    pst.CanOpenPosition,
    pst.CanClosePosition,
    pst.CanEditPosition,
    pst.CanBeCopied,
    pst.CanDeposit,
    pst.CanRequestWithdraw,
    fsc.PlayerStatusReasonID,
    psr.Name AS PlayerStatusReasonName,
    fsc.PlayerStatusSubReasonID,
    pssr.PlayerStatusSubReasonName,
    fsc.AccountManagerID,
    concat(dm.FirstName, ' ', dm.LastName) AS AccountManager,
    fsc.LanguageID,
    dl.Name AS Language,
    fsc.CommunicationLanguageID,
    dcl.Name AS CommunicationLanguage,
    fsc.AccountTypeID,
    act.Name AS AccountType
FROM main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_date dd
JOIN main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_customer_periodic_status dps
    ON dd.DateKey = dps.DateID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_v_fact_snapshotcustomer_fromdateid_masked fsc
    ON dps.RealCID = fsc.RealCID 
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_range dr
    ON fsc.DateRangeID = dr.DateRangeID 
    AND dd.DateKey BETWEEN dr.FromDateID AND dr.ToDateID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dc
    ON fsc.CountryID = dc.CountryID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerlevel dpl
    ON fsc.PlayerLevelID = dpl.PlayerLevelID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_mifidcategorization dmc
    ON fsc.MifidCategorizationID = dmc.MifidCategorizationID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_regulation dr1
    ON fsc.RegulationID = dr1.DWHRegulationID
/*
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
      dd1.DateKey AS DateID,
      dcl.CID AS RealCID,
      dcl.ClusterDetail,
      dcl.ClusterSF,
      dcl.IsLastCluster,
      dcl.IsFirstCluster,
      dcl.IsSFCluster,
      dcl.UpdateDateIDSF,
      dcl.ClusterDynamic
    FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_cid_dailycluster dcl
    JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_date dd1
      ON dd1.DateKey BETWEEN dcl.FromDateID AND dcl.ToDateID
) cdl
    ON fsc.RealCID = cdl.RealCID
    AND cdl.DateID = dps.DateID
*/
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_customer_masked dc1
    ON fsc.RealCID = dc1.RealCID
JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_country dc2
    ON dc1.CitizenshipCountryID = dc2.CountryID
LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_gurustatus dgs
    ON fsc.GuruStatusID = dgs.GuruStatusID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_accountstatus ast
    ON fsc.AccountStatusID = ast.AccountStatusID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_accounttype act
    ON fsc.AccountTypeID = act.AccountTypeID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerstatus pst
    ON fsc.PlayerStatusID = pst.PlayerStatusID
LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerstatusreasons psr
    ON fsc.PlayerStatusReasonID = psr.PlayerStatusReasonID
LEFT JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_playerstatussubreasons pssr
    ON fsc.PlayerStatusSubReasonID = pssr.PlayerStatusSubReasonID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_language dl
    ON fsc.LanguageID = dl.LanguageID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_language dcl
    ON fsc.CommunicationLanguageID = dcl.LanguageID
INNER JOIN main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_manager dm
    ON fsc.AccountManagerID = dm.ManagerID
WHERE dd.IsLastDayOfMonth = 'Y'
AND fsc.IsValidCustomer = 1

columns.name: MonthStartDate

columns.name: MonthEndDate
columns.comment: Last day of the month for this snapshot row.

columns.name: MonthNumberOfYear
columns.comment: Month number within the year (1-12).

columns.name: ISOYearAndWeekNumber
columns.comment: ISO year and week number (e.g., 2026W15).

columns.name: DayNumberOfWeek_Sun_Start
columns.comment: Day number of the week (Sunday=1).

columns.name: MonthName
columns.comment: Full month name (e.g., January).

columns.name: MonthNameAbbreviation
columns.comment: Abbreviated month name (e.g., Jan).

columns.name: DayName
columns.comment: Full day name (e.g., Monday).

columns.name: DayNameAbbreviation
columns.comment: Abbreviated day name (e.g., Mon).

columns.name: CalendarYear
columns.comment: Calendar year (e.g., 2026).

columns.name: CalendarYearMonth
columns.comment: Calendar year-month label, format `YYYY-MM` (e.g. `'2026-04'`). Most common GROUP BY key for monthly rollups. (Tier 2 - live sample)

columns.name: CalendarYearQtr
columns.comment: Year-quarter key (e.g., 2026Q2).

columns.name: IsLastDayOfMonth
columns.comment: `'Y'` if FullDate is the last day of its calendar month, else `'N'`. (Tier 2 - live sample)

columns.name: IsWeekday
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if this date is a weekday (Mon-Fri).

columns.name: IsWeekend
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if this date is a weekend (Sat-Sun).

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Real customer ID. HASH distribution key. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Customer_Periodic_Status)

columns.name: IsFunded_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Customer was funded on the last day of this Month (last-day semantics, not any-day). A customer is Funded if all four criteria held on that final day: (1) real deposit excl. bad-FTD cohort; (2) KYC level 3; (3) at least one non-airdrop activity (TP trade, IOB, or Options); AND (4) positive equity across TP/eMoney/Options. Changed Nov 2025 from any-day to last-day. 0 if not funded on final day even if funded earlier. Source: Function_Population_Funded via DDR_Customer_Daily_Status. (Tier 1)

columns.name: ActiveTraded_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Count of days in this Month on which the customer was a DDR active trader. SUM (not 0/1) - value > 0 means active at least once. Active = explicitly opened a position (ActionTypeID 1 or 39), opened/added to a copy mirror (ActionTypeID 15=OpenMirror, 17=AddMirror), or placed an Options trade. Auto-created copy positions excluded. Source: Function_Population_Active_Traders. (Tier 1)

columns.name: Portfolio_Only_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Count of days in this Month on which the customer was in the HODL/Portfolio-Only segment (held open TP/Options position, no active trading). COUNT where Portfolio_Only>0 AND ActiveTraded=0 (conditional hierarchy - Active Traders excluded). Value > 0 means HODL at least once. Source: Function_Population_Portfolio_Only. (Tier 1)

columns.name: BalanceOnlyAccount_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Count of days in this Month on which the customer had positive equity across any platform (TP/eMoney/Options) but held no open positions and placed no trading actions (cash at eToro, no portfolio). COUNT where BalanceOnlyAccount>0 AND ActiveTraded=0 AND Portfolio_Only=0. Value > 0 means balance-only at least once. Source: Function_Population_Balance_Only_Accounts. (Tier 1)

columns.name: GlobalDeposited_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if customer made a deposit this month (any platform).

columns.name: GlobalRedeposited_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if customer made a re-deposit (not first) this month.

columns.name: GlobalCashedOut_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if customer made a withdrawal this month.

columns.name: Redeemed_ThisMonth
columns.comment: Flag: 1 if customer redeemed crypto this month.

columns.name: RegulationID
columns.comment: Regulatory entity governing this account. FK to Dictionary.Regulation. Top values: CySEC=7.39M, BVI=7.30M, FCA=1.17M. Changes trigger RegulationChangeDate update. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: PlayerLevelID
columns.comment: Customer experience/permission level. FK to Dictionary.PlayerLevel. 1=Standard (94%); 4=Popular Investor; 7=VIP. Determines available features and risk limits. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: MifidCategorizationID
columns.comment: MiFID II investor classification. FK to Dictionary.MifidCategorization. Values: 1=Retail (97.3%), 4=Eligible Counterparty (2.6%), 5=Professional (0.03%). Default=1. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: IsValidCustomer
columns.comment: DWH-computed: 1 when not Popular Investor (PlayerLevelID != 4), not label 30/26, and not CountryID=250. Used in reporting to filter out non-standard customers. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: IsCreditReportValidCB
columns.comment: DWH-computed: similar to IsValidCustomer but with additional AccountTypeID != 2 exclusion and specific CID exceptions for CountryID=250. (Tier 2 - SP_Dim_Customer)

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Short code for the regulation.

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Full country name in English.

columns.name: ClubTier
columns.comment: Tier display name (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond, Internal, N/A).

columns.name: MifidCategory
columns.comment: MiFID II client categorization (e.g., Retail, Professional). Resolved from Dim_MifidCategorization.

columns.name: MifidType
columns.comment: MiFID II client classification as ’Professional’ if MifidCategorizationID is 2 or 3, otherwise ’Retail’.

columns.name: CitizenshipCountry
columns.comment: Country of citizenship. Resolved from Dim_Country via CitizenshipCountryID.

columns.name: GuruStatusID
columns.comment: eToro Popular Investor/Guru program status - whether the customer is an active copy trading strategy provider. FK to Dictionary.GuruStatus. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: GuruStatusName
columns.comment: Human-readable PI tier name. Values: No, Certified, Cadet, Rising Star, Champion, Elite, Elite Pro, Removed, Rejected. Used in BackOffice customer views, Trade procedures, and SalesForce integration. (Tier 1 - Dictionary.GuruStatus)

columns.name: IsPI
columns.comment: Popular Investor flag. `CASE WHEN GuruStatusID >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`. Source: Fact_SnapshotCustomer.GuruStatusID. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: AccountStatusID
columns.comment: Account enabled/suspended status, default 0, with foreign key to Dim_AccountStatus.

columns.name: AccountStatusName
columns.comment: Human-readable label for the account state: 'Open', 'Closed', or 'N/A'. Used in reporting to display account state. Sourced directly from Dictionary.AccountStatus.AccountStatusName. (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.AccountStatus)

columns.name: PlayerStatusID
columns.comment: Compliance and trading account status. FK to Dictionary.PlayerStatus. 1=Active/Registered (97.5% of accounts); other values indicate restricted, closed, banned, or special states. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatusName
columns.comment: Current player status name (e.g., Active, Blocked). Resolved from Dim_PlayerStatus.

columns.name: PlayerStatusReasonID
columns.comment: Reason code for current PlayerStatusID. Provides the why behind a non-Active status. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatusReasonName
columns.comment: Reason for current player status. Resolved from Dim_PlayerStatusReasons.

columns.name: PlayerStatusSubReasonID
columns.comment: Sub-reason code for PlayerStatus (hierarchical). FK to Dictionary.PlayerStatusSubReasons. Added 2022 (COINF-1989). (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: PlayerStatusSubReasonName
columns.comment: Human-readable sub-reason label (renamed from production `Name`). Nullable. Key abbreviations: CHBK=Chargeback, POI=Proof of Identity, POA=Proof of Address, FTD=First Time Deposit, MOP=Method of Payment, PWMB=eToro Money, SAR=Suspicious Activity Report, WCH=World Check. Key values: Fraud (1), Fake docs (2), ACH CHBK (35), Credit Card CHBK (36), PayPal CHBK (37), SAR filed (73), FATCA (66), W-8BEN (76), Vulnerable Client (75). (Tier 1 - upstream wiki, Dictionary.PlayerStatusSubReasons)

columns.name: AccountManagerID
columns.comment: Currently assigned BackOffice sales/service agent (renamed from ManagerID). FK to BackOffice.Manager. NULL = unassigned. (Tier 1 - BackOffice.Customer)

columns.name: AccountManager
columns.comment: Concatenation of staff member’s first name and last name.

columns.name: LanguageID
columns.comment: Customer preferred platform language. FK to Dictionary.Language. Controls UI language. Default=0. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: Language
columns.comment: Language display name.

columns.name: CommunicationLanguageID
columns.comment: Language for customer communications (emails, notifications). May differ from LanguageID if customer has different communication preferences. (Tier 1 - Customer.CustomerStatic)

columns.name: CommunicationLanguage
columns.comment: Customer's preferred communication language (emails, notifications). Resolved from Dim_Language.Name via CommunicationLanguageID. May differ from platform Language. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Language)

columns.name: AccountTypeID
columns.comment: Account type (e.g., 7=Employee, 9=excluded type, 2=real account), default 0, with foreign key to Dim_AccountType.

columns.name: AccountType
columns.comment: Human-readable account type label.

objects.name: vg_ddr_revenue
objects.view_definition:
SELECT 
    dfr.DateID,
    dfr.Date,
    dfr.RealCID,
    dfr.ActionTypeID,
    dfr.ActionType,
    dfr.InstrumentTypeID,
    dfr.IsSettled,
    dfr.IsCopy,
    dfr.Metric,
    dfr.Amount,
    dfr.CountTransactions,
    dfr.IncludedInTotalRevenue,
    dfr.CountAsActiveTrade,
    dfr.UpdateDate,
    dfr.IsBuy,
    dfr.IsLeveraged,
    dfr.IsFuture,
    dfr.IsCopyFund,
    dfr.IsOpenedFromIBAN,
    dfr.IsClosedToIBAN,
    dfr.IsRecurring,
    dfr.IsAirDrop,
    dfr.IsSQF,
    dfr.RevenueMetricID,
    dfr.RevenueMetricCategoryID,
    dfr.IsMarginTrade,
    dfr.IsC2P,
    drm.RevenueMetricCategory,
    vit.InstrumentType,
    CASE 
        WHEN dfr.IsFuture = 1 OR vit.InstrumentTypeID IN (1, 2, 4) THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS IsICC
FROM main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_ddr_fact_revenue_generating_actions dfr
JOIN main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_dim_revenue_metrics drm
    ON dfr.RevenueMetricID = drm.RevenueMetricID
JOIN main.bi_output.bi_ouput_v_dim_instrumenttype vit 
    ON dfr.InstrumentTypeID = vit.InstrumentTypeID

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date key in YYYYMMDD format. DELETE/INSERT partition key. Direct from revenue functions (except Staking: lagged one month via `DATEADD(MONTH,1,...)`). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Calendar date. `@date` SP parameter for main INSERT; computed from DateID for Staking. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: RealCID
columns.comment: Customer identifier. Distribution key. From revenue functions (CID renamed to RealCID for some). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: ActionTypeID
columns.comment: Trading action type. From `Function_Revenue_FullCommissions/Commissions.ActionTypeID` for trading fees; `ISNULL(...,-1)` - sentinel -1 for non-trading metrics. Values: 1=Open, 39=Close. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: ActionType
columns.comment: Action or revenue stream label. `Dim_ActionType.Name` for commissions; literal string for others ('Rollover', 'SDRT', 'CashoutFeeExclRedeem', etc.). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: Instrument asset class ID. Values: 1=Stocks, 2=Currencies, 3=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Crypto, 6=ETFs. Sentinel -1 = not applicable (account-level fees: CashoutFee, ConversionFee, DormantFee, InterestFee have no instrument). From Function_Revenue_* TVFs. (Tier 1 - Function_Revenue_FullCommissions)

columns.name: IsSettled
columns.comment: 1 = real/settled asset (stocks, ETFs, crypto with actual ownership; eligible for dividends and share lending, no overnight rollover). 0 = CFD (derivative without ownership; subject to spread and rollover fees). Sentinel -1 = not applicable (account-level fees: DormantFee, ConversionFee, CashoutFee). From Function_Revenue_* TVFs via Dim_Instrument.IsSettled. (Tier 1)

columns.name: IsCopy
columns.comment: Copy-trade flag. `CASE WHEN MirrorID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. C2F forced to -1. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: Metric
columns.comment: Revenue stream identifier. 18 distinct values: 'FullCommission', 'Commission', 'RollOverFee', 'Dividends', 'SDRT', 'TicketFee', 'TicketFeeByPercent', 'CashoutFeeExclRedeem', 'ConversionFee', 'DormantFee', 'InterestFee', 'TransferCoinFee', 'AdminFee', 'SpotPriceAdjustment', 'ShareLending', 'CryptoToFiatFee', 'StakingLagOneMonth', 'Options_PFOF'. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: Amount
columns.comment: Revenue amount in USD. `SUM(fee_column)` aggregated per CID × Metric × flags group. Positive = revenue, negative possible for dividends paid out. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: CountTransactions
columns.comment: Number of transactions/positions in the group. `COUNT(RealCID)` or `SUM(CountTransactions)`; `ISNULL(...,0)`. NULL/0 for ShareLending and Staking. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IncludedInTotalRevenue
columns.comment: Revenue inclusion flag. From `Dim_Revenue_Metrics.IncludedInTotalRevenue`. 1 = counts toward total revenue, 0 = excluded (Commission, Dividends, SDRT). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: CountAsActiveTrade
columns.comment: Active trade indicator. `CASE WHEN ActionTypeID IN (1,39) AND ISNULL(IsAirDrop,0) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`; `ISNULL(...,0)`. Only 1 for non-airdrop commission rows. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: ETL load timestamp. `GETDATE()` at SP execution time. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: Trade direction. `ISNULL(...,-1)`. 1=buy/long, 0=sell/short, -1=not applicable. Dividends: overridden to 1 if Amount>0, 0 if Amount<0. C2F: forced -1. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsLeveraged
columns.comment: Leverage flag. `CASE WHEN Leverage > 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsFuture
columns.comment: Futures contract flag. From functions or `Dim_Instrument.IsFuture` (AdminFee/SpotAdjust). `ISNULL(...,-1)`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsOpenedFromIBAN
columns.comment: Position opened from eMoney IBAN flag. Set via UPDATE JOIN to `External_*_opened_from_iban_parquet`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsClosedToIBAN
columns.comment: Position closed to eMoney IBAN flag. Set via UPDATE JOIN to `External_*_closed_to_iban_parquet`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsRecurring
columns.comment: Recurring investment position flag. Set via UPDATE JOIN to `External_bi_db_recurringinvestment_positions_parquet`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsAirDrop
columns.comment: AirDrop (free share) flag. From revenue functions; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. AirDrop positions excluded from active trade counts. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsSQF
columns.comment: Sustainable & Quality-Focused instrument flag. From functions or `Function_Instrument_Snapshot_Enriched`; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. NULL for Dividends/SDRT. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: RevenueMetricID
columns.comment: Revenue metric dictionary ID. From `Dim_Revenue_Metrics.RevenueMetricID` via Metric text match. 12=Staking, 18=Options. Enables ID-based filtering. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: RevenueMetricCategoryID
columns.comment: Revenue category ID. From `Dim_Revenue_Metrics.RevenueMetricCategoryID`. Groups metrics into categories (4=Staking, 5=Options). (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: IsMarginTrade
columns.comment: Margin trade flag. From revenue functions; `ISNULL(...,-1)`. Forced 0 for SDRT and Options_PFOF. (Tier 2 - SP_DDR_Fact_Revenue_Generating_Actions)

columns.name: RevenueMetricCategory
columns.comment: Category label (1:1 with RevenueMetricCategoryID). Used for high-level revenue rollups in the DDR. (Tier 1 - UC sample)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: IsICC
columns.comment: Indicates whether a revenue-generating action is classified as ICC, determined by checking if the action is a future (IsFuture = 1) or if the instrument type is 1, 2, or 4, returning 1 if either condition is true and 0 otherwise.

objects.name: vg_dealing_clicks_openclose_breakdown
objects.view_definition:
select
  cbd.Date,
  cbd.DateID,
  cbd.SellCurrency,
  cbd.Club,
  cbd.CID,
  cbd.IsBuy,
  cbd.HeldOnReportDate,
  cbd.HedgeServerID,
  cbd.InstrumentID,
  cbd.InstrumentDisplayName,
  cbd.InstrumentName,
  cbd.InstrumentTypeID,
  cbd.InstrumentType,
  cbd.IsCopy,
  cbd.IsCFD,
  cbd.Symbol,
  cbd.Leverage,
  cbd.Exchange,
  cbd.CountryID,
  cbd.Country,
  cbd.Region,
  cbd.RegulationID,
  cbd.Regulation,
  cbd.IsIslamic,
  cbd.Size_of_Tickets,
  cbd.OpenOrClose,
  cbd.OpenOrCloseID,
  cbd.Click,
  cbd.Volume,
  cbd.Units,
  cbd.FullCommission,
  cbd.InitialAmountUSDOnOpen,
  cbd.UpdateDate,
  cbd.IsPI,
  cbd.IsTicketFee,
  -1 * cbd.TicketFee as TicketFee,
  cbd.IsAirDrop,
  cbd.IsFuture,
  cbd.etr_y,
  cbd.etr_ym,
  cbd.etr_ymd,
  cbd.HaseMoneyAccount,
  cbd.IsIBANClick,
  cbd.IsFTDClick,
  cbd.IsLowTouch,
  di.Multiplier,
  cfd.Manager
from
  main.dealing.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dealing_dbo_dealing_clicks_openclose_breakdown cbd
    join main.dwh.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_dwh_dbo_dim_instrument di
      on cbd.InstrumentID = di.InstrumentID
    join main.bi_db.gold_sql_dp_prod_we_bi_db_dbo_bi_db_cidfirstdates_masked cfd
      on cbd.CID = cfd.CID

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Report date. Set to `@Date` SP parameter (typically yesterday). One day's worth of clicks per load. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: DateID
columns.comment: Date of action as YYYYMMDD integer. Derived from Occurred. Part of nonclustered indexes — key filter column.

columns.name: SellCurrency
columns.comment: Text abbreviation of SellCurrencyID -- denormalized from Dictionary.Currency.Abbreviation. Example: USD, EUR, GBX (GBP pence). DWH-added for query convenience. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: Club
columns.comment: Customer's eToro Club tier level. Resolved from Dim_PlayerLevel.Name via PlayerLevelID. Values: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Platinum Plus, Diamond. Updated daily. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_PlayerLevel)

columns.name: CID
columns.comment: Customer ID — the account that owns this position. References the customer entity. Nonclustered index supports CID-based queries.

columns.name: IsBuy
columns.comment: Trade direction: True=Buy/Long, False=Sell/Short. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsBuy.

columns.name: HeldOnReportDate
columns.comment: Whether position was still open at end of report date. `CASE WHEN CloseDateID > @DateID OR CloseDateID = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`. Renamed from IsOpen (SR-325240). Always 0 for close clicks. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedge server routing/executing hedges for this position. References Trade.HedgeServer.HedgeServerID.

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: Financial instrument. References Dim_Instrument. 0 for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.InstrumentID.

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: User-facing instrument display name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData. More descriptive than Name (e.g., 'Apple Inc.' vs 'Apple'). NULL for instruments without metadata entries. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: InstrumentName
columns.comment: Internal instrument name from Trade.Instrument. Renamed from Dim_Instrument.Name. For forex: pair notation (e.g., EUR/USD). For stocks: company name. (Tier 3 - live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: InstrumentTypeID
columns.comment: Instrument type category: 1=Currencies (forex), 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies. Note TypeIDs 3, 7, 8, 9 are unused gaps. Distribution: Stocks 82%, ETF 8%, Crypto 4%, Commodities 3%, Indices 2%, Currencies 1%. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Text label for InstrumentTypeID -- DWH-computed via CASE: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices, 5=Stocks, 6=ETF, 10=Crypto Currencies, else=Other. Use InstrumentTypeID for filtering; InstrumentType for display. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument)

columns.name: IsCopy
columns.comment: Copy-trade flag. `CASE WHEN MirrorID > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`. 1=position opened via CopyTrader, 0=direct trade. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: IsCFD
columns.comment: CFD vs Real asset flag. `CASE WHEN IsSettled = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END`. 1=CFD (contract for difference), 0=Real stock/crypto ownership. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: Ticker symbol for the instrument (e.g., AAPL, EURUSD, BTCUSD). Used for display, search, and price feed identification. NULL for ID=0 placeholder and some instruments without formal ticker. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro.Trade.GetInstrument)

columns.name: Leverage
columns.comment: Leverage multiplier for position events. 0=non-position event. 1=no leverage (real ownership). Same meaning as Dim_Position.Leverage.

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: Stock exchange name from Trade.InstrumentMetaData (e.g., Nasdaq, NYSE, LSE). NULL for non-stock instruments. (Tier 3 -- live data, etoro_Trade_InstrumentMetaData)

columns.name: CountryID
columns.comment: Country ID — FK to Dim_Country.CountryID. Use Dim_Country for country name, region, regulation mapping, and risk group. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Customer)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Customer's country of registration. Resolved from Dim_Country.Name via CountryID. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Geographic region for business reporting. Resolved from Dim_Country.Region. Values: UK, French, German, Italian, Other Asia, USA, Spanish, Eastern Europe, etc. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Country)

columns.name: RegulationID
columns.comment: Regulatory entity ID. FK to Dim_Regulation.ID. Values: 0=None, 1=CySEC, 2=FCA, 3=NFA, 4=ASIC, 5=BVI (~80%), 6=eToroUS, 7=FinCEN, 8=FinCEN+FINRA, 9=FSA Seychelles, 10=ASIC&GAML, 11=FSRA, 12=FINRAONLY, 13=MAS, 14=NYDFS+FINRA. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Regulation)

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Regulation name from Dim_Regulation.Name. Examples: CySEC, FCA, ASIC. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: IsIslamic
columns.comment: Islamic (swap-free) account flag. `CASE WHEN WeekendFeePrecentage = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`. Source: Dim_Customer.WeekendFeePrecentage. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: Size_of_Tickets
columns.comment: Ticket size bucket classification for the trade.

columns.name: OpenOrClose
columns.comment: Row type: `'Open Click'` or `'Close Click'`. Literal string set by SP. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: OpenOrCloseID
columns.comment: Row type numeric: 1=Open Click, 0=Close Click. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: Click
columns.comment: Trade event count. `SUM(NumberofPositionsOpened)` for opens (1 per non-partial-close position opened on @Date), `SUM(NumberofPositionsClosed)` for closes. Aggregated in GROUP BY. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: Volume
columns.comment: Open volume = rounded(Units * Price * ConversionRate). Pro-rated for partial close — parents and children each show volume pro-rated to their own AmountInUnitsDecimal.

columns.name: Units
columns.comment: Instrument units traded. For opens: `SUM(InitialUnits)` WHERE OpenDateID=@DateID. For closes: `SUM(AmountInUnitsDecimal)` WHERE CloseDateID=@DateID. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: FullCommission
columns.comment: Full spread at position open = market spread + eToro markup. NULL for non-position events. Same meaning as Dim_Position.FullCommission.

columns.name: InitialAmountUSDOnOpen
columns.comment: Initial investment in USD for open clicks only. `SUM(InitialAmountCents/100) WHERE NumberofPositionsOpened=1`. Always 0 for close clicks. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: UpdateDate
columns.comment: Last ETL update timestamp for this row. Set to GETDATE() on every INSERT or UPDATE. Use to verify data freshness. (Tier 2 — SP code)

columns.name: IsPI
columns.comment: Popular Investor flag. `CASE WHEN GuruStatusID >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END`. Source: Fact_SnapshotCustomer.GuruStatusID. (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: TicketFee
columns.comment: The negative of the ticket fee amount, which is the sum of amounts from customer actions where the action type classifier is 35, the fee dividend indicator is 4, and the date matches the specified date ID, joined on position ID and open or close ID.

columns.name: IsAirDrop
columns.comment: Airdrop flag: 1=position created by eToro on behalf of customer (staking, promotions, compensations). Same meaning as Dim_Position.IsAirDrop.

columns.name: IsFuture
columns.comment: Futures instrument flag. Direct from Dim_Instrument.IsFuture. Added SR-308870 (2025-04-07). (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: etr_y
columns.comment: Year extracted from the date (eToro convention, e.g., 2026).

columns.name: etr_ym
columns.comment: Year-month extracted from the date (eToro convention, e.g., 2026-04).

columns.name: etr_ymd
columns.comment: Full date in eToro convention (YYYY-MM-DD).

columns.name: HaseMoneyAccount
columns.comment: Has eMoney account flag (note: intentional typo in column name). `CASE WHEN eMoney_Dim_Account.CID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END` WHERE GCID_Unique_Count=1 AND IsValidETM=1. Added SR-346605 (2025-12-07). (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: IsLowTouch
columns.comment: Low-touch instrument flag. From Dim_Instrument.OperationMode. Indicates instruments with simplified execution flow. Added SR-346605 (2025-12-07). (Tier 2 - SP_Clicks_OpenClose_Breakdown)

columns.name: Multiplier
columns.comment: Futures contract size multiplier from Trade.FuturesMetaData. Determines how many units of the underlying asset one contract represents. NULL for non-futures instruments. (Tier 2 -- SP_Dim_Instrument, etoro_Trade_FuturesMetaData)

columns.name: Manager
columns.comment: Account manager's full name (FirstName + LastName). Resolved from Dim_Manager via AccountManagerID. 'System' = no assigned manager. (Tier 2 — SP code, Dim_Manager)

objects.name: vg_dealing_dealingdashboard_cid
objects.view_definition:
SELECT Date
	 , HedgeServerID
	 , InstrumentType
	 , InstrumentID
	 , InstrumentDisplayName
	 , InstrumentName
	 , Symbol
	 , SellCurrency
	 , Exchange
	 , Regulation
	 , Country
	 , Region
	 , Mifid
	 , IsCopy
	 , IsCFD
	 , Leverage
	 , sum(NOP						) as NOP
	 , sum(LongOpenPositions		) as LongOpenPositions		
	 , sum(ShortOpenPositions		) as ShortOpenPositions		
	 , sum(UnitsNOP					) as UnitsNOP					
	 , sum(UnitsBuy					) as UnitsBuy					
	 , sum(UnitsSell				) as UnitsSell				
	 , sum(RealizedZero				) as RealizedZero				
	 , sum(ChangeInUnrealizedZero	) as ChangeInUnrealizedZero	
	 , sum(TotalZero				) as TotalZero				
	 , sum(VariableSpread			) as VariableSpread			
	 , sum(OverNightFee				) as OverNightFee				
	 , sum(Dividend					) as Dividend					
	 , sum(OverNightFee_Long		) as OverNightFee_Long		
	 , sum(OverNightFee_Short		) as OverNightFee_Short		
FROM main.dealing.bi_output_dealing_dealingdashboard_cid
GROUP BY 
	Date
	 , HedgeServerID
	 , InstrumentType
	 , InstrumentID
	 , InstrumentDisplayName
	 , InstrumentName
	 , Symbol
	 , SellCurrency
	 , Exchange
	 , Regulation
	 , Country
	 , Region
	 , Mifid
	 , IsCopy
	 , IsCFD
	 , Leverage

columns.name: Date
columns.comment: Represents the specific date of the transaction or event being captured.

columns.name: HedgeServerID
columns.comment: Hedging Strategy ID

columns.name: InstrumentType
columns.comment: Asset Class (Stocks, ETF etc)

columns.name: InstrumentID
columns.comment: A unique integer identifying the specific financial instrument related to the transaction.

columns.name: InstrumentDisplayName
columns.comment: The user-friendly name of the financial instrument, aiding in recognition and reporting.

columns.name: InstrumentName
columns.comment: Technical name of the instrument, providing detailed categorization for analysis.

columns.name: Symbol
columns.comment: The market symbol for the instrument, commonly used for trading and identification.

columns.name: SellCurrency
columns.comment: Indicates the currency in which the selling transaction was conducted.

columns.name: Exchange
columns.comment: The name of the exchange where the transaction occurred, which is crucial for regulatory and reporting purposes.

columns.name: Regulation
columns.comment: Describes the regulations/subsidiaries under which the transaction was executed, essential for compliance (CySEC, FCA etc)

columns.name: Country
columns.comment: Denotes the country linked to the transaction, important for understanding regional performance.

columns.name: Region
columns.comment: Indicates the broader marketing region where the transaction took place, providing context for market analysis.

columns.name: Mifid
columns.comment: MiFID - retail or professional, relevant for regulatory reporting and investor protection categorization.

columns.name: IsCopy
columns.comment: Indicates whether the transaction was a copy trade, relevant for understanding trading strategies.

columns.name: IsCFD
columns.comment: Shows if the transaction involved a Contract for Difference (CFD)

columns.name: Leverage
columns.comment: Represents the leverage applied to the transaction, impacting risk and return calculations.

columns.name: NOP
columns.comment: Net Open Positions - netting of long and short open positions EOD.

columns.name: LongOpenPositions
columns.comment: Number of currently open long (buy) positions.

columns.name: ShortOpenPositions
columns.comment: Number of currently open short (sell) positions.

columns.name: UnitsNOP
columns.comment: Total units across all net open positions.

columns.name: UnitsBuy
columns.comment: Total units held in long (buy) open positions.

columns.name: UnitsSell
columns.comment: Total units held in short (sell) open positions.

columns.name: RealizedZero
columns.comment: Realized P&L - full spread: excludes spreads from impact on profit/loss calculation.

columns.name: ChangeInUnrealizedZero
columns.comment: Change in unrealized P&L calculated with zero spread, showing daily mark-to-market movement.

columns.name: TotalZero
columns.comment: Total P&L (realized + unrealized) calculated with zero spread.

columns.name: VariableSpread
columns.comment: Variable spread revenue (=market spread without etoro commissions) collected on the transaction.

columns.name: OverNightFee
columns.comment: Total overnight (rollover) fee charged across relevant positions.

columns.name: Dividend
columns.comment: Dividend amount credited or debited for the position.

columns.name: OverNightFee_Long
columns.comment: Overnight (rollover) fee charged specifically on long positions.

columns.name: OverNightFee_Short
columns.comment: Overnight (rollover) fee charged specifically on short positions.

columns.name: segment
columns.comment: True if user has been inactive/churned for more than 30 days

columns.name: list_of_cid
columns.comment: The primary unique Customer Identifier for the Trading account

columns.name: story
columns.comment: The date the customer opened their first manual trading position
